params.name: Dyson Sphere
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.07%)
params.description:
On Apr 29, 1960 AD, Dyson came up with the idea of this artificial planet mining structure.

A Dyson Sphere is an energy-receiving device that encircles a star and captures its energy. Stars generate huge amounts of energy every second, and the harvest of this energy is enough for humanity to use for millions of years. A civilization could rely on a Dyson Sphere. But only when civilizations develop to a stellar level can they be able to build Dyson Spheres, harness the energy of stars, and move  …
